brezza-di-mare.shortDescription: Modern hillside villa with panoramic Caribbean views, infinity pool, spa, and seamless indoor-outdoor living in Fish Bay.
description: Brezza di Mare features a seamless, modern design emphasizing comfort and panoramic views.

The main level hosts an open-concept great room with a gourmet kitchen, dining area, and half bath, ideal for entertaining. Floor-to-ceiling windows frame breathtaking vistas of Ram Head and the Caribbean Sea.
A private staircase leads down to two air-conditioned primary suites, each with a king bed, private deck, chaise lounges, and en-suite bathrooms featuring double vanities and rock showers.

Outside, the villa truly comes alive. A spacious covered outdoor living and dining area includes a sectional sofa and table for up to 10 guests, perfect for al fresco meals. The 20' x 10' knife-edge infinity pool and adjacent hot tub overlook the sea, while a sun deck with loungers invites relaxation.

A built-in gas grill, outdoor sink, and mini-fridge make outdoor cooking effortless. Nestled at the end of a quiet road in Fish Bay, the property offers both serenity and luxury, just minutes from St. John's pristine beaches and national park trails. The villa is at the end of its road, providing complete serenity, but is only a 12-minute drive to Cruz Bay.

Brezza di Mare is next door to its sister property, San Costanzo. For large or multi-generational groups, renting 2 bedroom/2 bathroom San Costanzo with 2 bedroom/2.5 bathroom Brezza di Mare gives guests the flexibility of privacy and time together.
Base nightly rates vary and additional per person per night charges and other fees may apply.
To book direct, please contact James M. Miller Property Management at miller.marc17@yahoo.com.

booking.note: VRBO reviews and photo gallery can be referenced alongside the direct booking contact.

amenityGroups.title: Essentials
items: Wifi speed: 100+ Mbps (good for 1-2 people or up to 6 devices)
Bath and beach towels, plus coolers for beach days

reviews.quote: We had a wonderful stay at this beautiful home. The sunrise views from the large open deck were beautiful every morning. The outdoor pool and dining space were an awesome place to hang out, and we grilled several evenings instead of dining out because we didn't want to leave.
reviews.author: Rhonda W.

reviews.quote: The house was wonderful. My husband and I enjoyed the pool, hot tub, and outdoor area. The indoor and outdoor shower was also pretty cool. Everything worked as it should and the house was easy to get to. This might have been our favorite place we've stayed at.
reviews.author: Emily P.
